paragraphs.text: 春节是中国最重要的节日。
paragraphs.translation: Spring Festival is the most important holiday in China.

paragraphs.text: 春节的时候，全家人都会聚在一起吃饭。
paragraphs.translation: During Spring Festival, the whole family gets together to eat.

paragraphs.text: 大家会吃饺子、鱼和年糕。
paragraphs.translation: Everyone eats dumplings, fish, and New Year cake.

paragraphs.text: 小朋友们最喜欢收红包，因为红包里有压岁钱。
paragraphs.translation: Children like receiving red envelopes the most, because there is lucky money inside.

paragraphs.text: 晚上，大家还会放烟花，五颜六色的，非常漂亮！
paragraphs.translation: In the evening, people set off fireworks — they are colorful and very beautiful!
